overview:
## Discussion

Use this key to set `auxAttributes` in [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelBufferPoolCreatePixelBufferWithAuxAttributes(_:_:_:_:)].

The value for this key specifies that the system shouldn’t allocate a new pixel buffer if the pool already holds at least the specified number of allocated pixel buffers. This key doesn’t prevent the system from recycling allocated buffers. If this key causes [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelBufferPoolCreatePixelBufferWithAuxAttributes(_:_:_:_:)] to fail, it returns the [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/kCVReturnWouldExceedAllocationThreshold] result code.

# kCVPixelBufferPoolAllocationThresholdKey

**Global Variable**

The key you use to set the auxiliary attributes dictionary.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVPixelBufferPoolAllocationThresholdKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

Use this key to set `auxAttributes` in [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelBufferPoolCreatePixelBufferWithAuxAttributes(_:_:_:_:)].

The value for this key specifies that the system shouldn’t allocate a new pixel buffer if the pool already holds at least the specified number of allocated pixel buffers. This key doesn’t prevent the system from recycling allocated buffers. If this key causes [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelBufferPoolCreatePixelBufferWithAuxAttributes(_:_:_:_:)] to fail, it returns the [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/kCVReturnWouldExceedAllocationThreshold] result code.

## Constants

- **kCVPixelBufferPoolMinimumBufferCountKey**: The minimum number of buffers allowed in the pixel buffer pool.
- **kCVPixelBufferPoolMaximumBufferAgeKey**: The key you use to set the maximum allowable age for a buffer in the pixel buffer pool.
